title.en: China-to-Australia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Australian requirements: ACCC button/coin battery mandatory safety and information standards, Australian Consumer Law product safety obligations, RCM/EESS electrical safety, AS/NZS IEC 62133 safety testing, UN 38.3 and Australian Dangerous Goods transport controls.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与澳大利亚要求对照：ACCC纽扣/硬币电池强制安全及信息标准、澳大利亚消费者法产品安全义务、RCM/EESS电气安全、AS/NZS IEC 62133安全测试、UN 38.3及澳大利亚危险货物运输管控。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與澳洲要求對照：ACCC鈕扣/硬幣電池強制安全及資訊標準、澳洲消費者法產品安全義務、RCM/EESS電氣安全、AS/NZS IEC 62133安全測試、UN 38.3及澳洲危險貨物運輸管控。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, regulator assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、监管机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、監管機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must check whether the product contains button/coin cells covered by ACCC mandatory standards, appoint or work through an Australian Responsible Supplier for in-scope electrical equipment, support RCM/EESS compliance, keep AS/NZS IEC 62133 evidence where applicable, and provide UN 38.3 plus ADG dangerous-goods transport documentation; Chinese GB 31241 or CCC evidence alone does not satisfy Australian market obligations.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须确认产品是否含有受ACCC强制标准约束的纽扣/硬币电池，并由澳大利亚责任供应商或通过其完成适用电气设备的RCM/EESS合规，按适用情况保留AS/NZS IEC 62133证据，并提供UN 38.3及ADG危险货物运输文件；仅有中国GB 31241或CCC资料不能满足澳大利亚市场义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須確認產品是否含有受ACCC強制標準約束的鈕扣/硬幣電池，並由澳洲責任供應商或透過其完成適用電氣設備的RCM/EESS合規，按適用情況保留AS/NZS IEC 62133證據，並提供UN 38.3及ADG危險貨物運輸文件；僅有中國GB 31241或CCC資料不能滿足澳洲市場義務。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from accc.gov.au, productsafety.gov.au, eess.gov.au, legislation.gov.au, ntc.gov.au, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
